inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 free cash flow $4.6B divided by 623M weighted average diluted shares (10-K filed 2026-02-12)
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash uses company-reported FCF (operating cash flow less capital spending). FY2025 net income $2.5B is below FCF due to $1.6B stock-based compensation and rising marketing spend; Lawrence base uses cash generation, not GAAP net income.

bear.notes: Regulatory fee pressure, GBV growth slows to low single digits, multiple compresses on travel recession

base.notes: FY2025 nights +8% and GBV +12%; Q1 2026 revenue +18% and nights +9%; modest take-rate and ADR lift

bull.notes: Experiences/services mix expands; international GBV re-accelerates; sustained buybacks shrink share count

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light marketplace; no land or reserves on balance sheet at historical misstatement (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Experiences and services are small versus nights; seats embedded in Nights and Seats Booked KPI (10-K)

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Deferred revenue $1.7B reflects unearned guest fees; GBV leads revenue at check-in (10-K balance sheet)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Q1 2026 $70M realized gain on sale of privately-held equity investment (10-Q Q1 2026); immaterial to consolidated value

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No dated legal recovery or trust distribution

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue path?
option_scan.evidence: Long-term stays (28+ nights), experiences/services, and AI-assisted search embedded in GBV growth path (10-K product section)

human_review.notes: First Marvin deep dive 2026-07-10; confirm live price and lodging-tax regulatory developments on next 10-Q.

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: Nights and Seats Booked growth (+8% FY2025, +9% Q1 2026) plus modest ADR lift drives revenue; high incremental margins on GBV convert to FCF given low capex.
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Sustained GBV growth below 4% for four quarters or material take-rate cuts from regulatory fee caps.
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Experiences/services exceed 15% of GBV with margin accretion sustained two years.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

top_dissents.label: Murray Stahl
top_dissents.falsifier: No asset intensity / pricing power (moat eroding + non-croupier)

top_dissents.label: Horizon Kinetics
top_dissents.falsifier: No dated contractual payoff or royalty/trust structure

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map the core marketplace owner-cash engine, experiences/services option, net financial claims, and regulatory reserve once each.

components.label: Core marketplace owner-cash engine (nights and GBV)

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ABNB/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260212_rpt20251231_acc0001559720_26_000004.htm: FY2025 FCF $4600.0M, revenue $12241.0M, cash $6864.0M, long-term debt $1995.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: Normalized owner cash per diluted share

source.locator: FY2025 free cash flow $4600.0M ÷ 623.0M weighted average diluted shares
Free cash flow $4.6B for year ended December 31, 2025
623M weighted average diluted shares (FY2025 income statement)

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth from valuation.json scenarios.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade after platform scale; regulatory and marketing drag in outer years.

assumptions.label: Required return on owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Platform quality bounds; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 18× / 22× / 26× on year-7 cash path.

assumptions.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves Phase-3 component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Regulatory, tax, and execution reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for lodging-tax enforcement, city STR bans, SBC dilution, and marketing inflation not fully embedded in owner-cash multiple.

valuation_methodology.decision_rule: Use one complete non-overlapping component schedule. The legacy Lawrence return path remains a separate stance gate.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Core marketplace owner-cash engine (nights and GBV)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
